name: Example Node.js Module
description: Reference ASLM Node.js module: Express WebView UI, typed settings (getExec/setExec), downloads bridge (stdio JSON), host theme/locale snapshots, module interop HTTP client, and host-managed nodejs-runtime venv.
author: NEXTGGTECH

firstRun.name: Initialize settings.json
firstRun.description: Creates Settings/settings.json from manifest defaults (first install or after update).

run.name: Express WebView server
run.description: Binds to example-port and serves App/ for the ASLM module page (ASLM_UI_PORT).

settings.name: Port number
settings.description: TCP port for the Express UI server; ASLM reserves it, injects ASLM_UI_PORT, and passes the value to setExec

settings.name: String value
settings.description: Plain text stored in settings.json, exported as ASLM_EXAMPLE_STRING; shown as the greeting banner on the dashboard
settings.default: Example Node.js Module - ASLM reference UI

settings.name: Boolean value
settings.description: ASLM passes "true"/"false" to setExec, normalised to a JS bool; when true, the dashboard shows ASLM_* env vars and raw JSON debug panels

settings.name: Integer value
settings.description: Whole number passed as a string to setExec and converted with parseInt(); used as the auto-refresh interval (ms) for the Module Interop registry timer

settings.name: Float value
settings.description: Decimal number passed to setExec and converted with parseFloat(); sampling fraction 0.0-1.0 for verbose log output in bridge and interop handlers

settings.name: Password value
settings.description: Masked in the ASLM UI, redacted to *** in GET /api/settings; used as a bearer token in sample HTTP client Authorization headers

settings.name: Select value
settings.description: Enum constrained to allowedValues; controls console output verbosity in main.js subcommands (basic: INFO, debug: DEBUG, trace: DEBUG + verbose)

settings.name: Engine flag
settings.description: Read-only flag set by ASLM; true when the nodejs-runtime engine is installed, false when the package is missing. Key equals the engine id.

settings.name: Path value
settings.description: Absolute path to node.exe in the host-managed venv; ASLM auto-fills it using the key prefix convention <engineId>_path

settings.name: Data directory
settings.description: Per-engine writable data root resolved by ASLM (Data/nodejs-runtime/); ASLM auto-fills it using the key prefix convention <engineId>_data

settings.name: Models directory
settings.description: Per-engine models directory resolved by ASLM (Models/nodejs-runtime/); ASLM auto-fills it using the key prefix convention <engineId>_models

settings.name: Host theme snapshot
settings.description: Host-only; ASLM calls apply_aslm_host_theme --file {path}, handler saves to Settings/host_theme.json and maps colors.* to CSS variables

settings.name: Host locale snapshot
settings.description: Host-only; ASLM calls apply_aslm_locale --file {path}, handler saves to Settings/host_locale.json; read language and displayName to localise UI strings

categories.title: Node.js reference artifacts
categories.description: Sample entries that document downloads bridge v1 operations. resolve_install returns step templates (download_file, extract_zip, npm_package) without downloading in this reference module.

example_data.description: Install root: <module>/Data/example-downloads/ — used as targetRef in installManifest/uninstallManifest from this bridge.
